originalTitle: RL Hyperparam Sweeps for 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL. Dev day #9
title: Hyperparameter Tuning with CARBS and Atari Speedup Validation
summary: Presented a benchmark showing CARBS outperforms random search, genetic algorithms, and Bayesian optimization on a synthetic task. Fixed Python wrappers to achieve 30,000+ train steps per second in Atari, reducing training time for Pong to under five minutes. Integrated reward weight sweeping into the MOBA environment and began performance optimization of the simulation.
